Each call retrieves a task-matched cognitive operation engineered in two layers: a natural-language procedure plus an executable reasoning topology (graph DAG with gates, parallel branches, and meta-cognitive exits). has_github_actions.summary: smolagents Tool subclasses for the Ejentum Reasoning Harness.
